expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and evaluates it under “Phase 1 Contract Check”: “Benchmark focus: Supporting issues remain `context_only_no_defect_analysis` and produce summaries; no defect-analysis triggering.” It then checks this and concludes it is “NOT DEMONSTRABLE from provided evidence (blocking evidence gap)” due to missing Phase 1 artifacts, showing the case focus is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly Phase-1 oriented: “Primary phase under test: Phase 1” and includes “What Phase 1 Must Do (per skill snapshot contract)” plus a “Phase 1 Contract Check…”. The verdict is framed as a Phase 1 evidence gap (“Missing Phase 1 runtime artifact: `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`”), which is aligned with assessing Phase 1 rather than performing later-phase work.
